Top 61 Burgundy Hair Color Shades of 2024
61 of the Best Burgundy Hair Color Shades for 2024

перефразируй
Popular Dark Red Wine Burgundy Hair
Trendy dark red wine burgundy hair

перефразируй
This dark burgundy wine-colored balayage blends into the naturally dark hair.  Use a violet toning conditioner if you’re a wine-haired lady. The violet brings out the purple tones in the color. For that, use Blonde Angel by Kevin Murphy.

A burgundy colour works well as a balayage on darker hair, too. I recommend you try the violet conditioner on dark red hair color, and you’ll be surprised at how pretty the results are. Red is famous for fading the fastest, so see your stylist to refresh the color.

This balayage seamlessly incorporates a deep burgundy wine hue into naturally dark hair. Enhance your wine-inspired locks with a violet toning conditioner to bring out the purple undertones. I suggest using Blonde Angel by Kevin Murphy for this. Burgundy tones also complement darker hair beautifully in a balayage style. Experiment with the violet conditioner on your dark red hair for stunning results. Keep in mind that red hues tend to fade quickly, so be sure to visit your stylist for regular color touch-ups.

перефразируй
Red Velvet Hue for Tapered Bob with Bangs
A tapered bob with bangs in a rich red velvet shade

перефразируй
Try a red velvet hue on a tapered bob with bangs. With red, you want a shade that works well with your complexion. Try a blue-violet red for cool skin tones with a pink undertone. Face-framing bangs with a tapered bob look great on pear and round face shapes.

Experiment with a red velvet shade on a tapered bob hairstyle featuring bangs. It's important to choose a red tone that complements your skin tone. Consider opting for a blue-violet red if you have cool undertones with a hint of pink. This trendy hairstyle, consisting of face-framing bangs paired with a tapered bob, is particularly flattering for individuals with pear or round face shapes.

перефразируй
Neutral Burgundy Tones on a Lob
Balanced burgundy shades on a long bob

перефразируй
The perfect way to change your usual lob is to try a neutral burgundy tone. This shade of violet brown is rich and vibrant, and it looks like what some might refer to as cherry cola. Use shampoo in a burgundy shade once every 2-4 weeks to keep the tone looking fresh.

For a fresh twist on your typical long bob hairstyle, consider experimenting with a neutral burgundy hue. This violet-brown shade is luscious and dynamic, resembling the color of cherry cola. To maintain the vibrancy of this tone, wash your hair with a burgundy shampoo every 2-4 weeks.

перефразируй
Burgundy red hair with soft layers is a beautiful choice. Adding layers to your shape will encourage movement so your hair won’t hang limp. Layering will also soften your features and give you a more feminine hairstyle. If you choose a vibrant red, it will certainly add spice to your cut. Try blowing out your style with a medium round brush, under and backward, to show off the layering.

Opting for burgundy red hair with gentle layers is a lovely decision. Incorporating layers into your haircut will create movement and prevent your hair from appearing flat. Additionally, layering will help to soften your features and provide a more feminine look. Choosing a vibrant red hue will undoubtedly enhance your haircut. Consider blow-drying your hair using a medium-sized round brush, directing the airflow underneath and backward to showcase the layers.

перефразируй
Cool Burgundy Tone on Medium Wavy Hair
A stylish burgundy shade on medium-length wavy hair

перефразируй
Wear a cool burgundy tone on medium-wavy hair. For a stylish color, try a reflective burgundy. A shade showing purple and violet will be perfect for the edgy and sassy woman. For the shade to show on dark hair, pre-lighten your hair. Or use a high-lift color that deposits color at the same time.

Sport a chic burgundy hue on your medium-length wavy hair. To achieve a trendy look, consider opting for a reflective burgundy shade that features hints of purple and violet, ideal for a bold and confident individual. If you have dark hair and want the color to show vibrantly, either lighten your hair beforehand or use a high-lift color that provides color while lightening.
